I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

The migration rule says `variant="light"` is no longer valid and should be replaced. The valid values are `"default"` and `"secondary"`. In PatternFly v6, the `"light"` variant was renamed to `"default"` — it represents the standard light-background page section. So the correct replacement is `variant="default"`.

There are two occurrences:
- Line 20: `<PageSection isFilled variant="light">`
- Line 24: `<PageSection isFilled variant="light">`

Both should be changed to `variant="default"`. No imports or other code need to change.
